## Checklist

- [ ] Commits follow conventional commits lite (`feat(scope):`, `fix(scope):`, …)
- [ ] Branch name follows `feat/<scope>-<title>` or `fix/<scope>-<title>`
- [ ] Labels added (1 zone + 1 priority)
- [ ] Linked to an issue / milestone where relevant
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
